infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReelWall uses your camera so you can take fishing photos, save them to your wall, and choose which moments to mount on ReelWall.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReelWall uses your photo library so you can upload existing fishing photos, organize them into collections, and choose which moments to mount on ReelWall.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ReelWall saves generated share images to your photo library only when you choose to export or share a ReelWall card.
